a.xlink:title: ADES1754 HELLO ALL specific command message to wake-up devices alongside daisy-chain.
Set Buffer mode for data acquisition.
Select Scan Mode of the cells.
Check if time pulse is currently enabled.
Refresh timing data from device (unified API for both UBX and NMEA devices)
Clear save load configuration from flash/BBR.
Configure UBX device baudrate via UBX commands.
Configure time pulse output for PPS (Pulse Per Second)
Initialize the GNSS device and configure communication.
Configure PPS output with optimal settings for timing sync.
Get the comparator blank time register.
Get the number of UART valid write accesses. Wraps around at 255.
Get the frequency of the PWM signal.
Set the comparator blank time register.
Set the PWM duty cycle and direction.
Set the frequency of the PWM signal.
Set the standstill mode. The motorrun bit will be set to 0.
